def_before: a person or company that has a contract to do work or provide goods or services for another company
the act of making parts of something, groups of people, etc. work together in an efficient and organized way
the use of skill and imagination to produce something new or to produce art
a group of people who represent the views of an organization, a country, etc.
the fact of not having something that you need, like enough food, money or a home; the process that causes this
the act of discovering or identifying the exact cause of an illness or a problem
the act of getting rid of something
the fact of being more important, powerful or easy to notice than somebody/something else
the fact of producing the result that is wanted or intended; the fact of producing a successful result
the act of making people obey a particular law or rule
the quality of being extremely good
the act of preventing somebody/something from entering a place or taking part in something ; a situation in which a child is banned from attending school because of bad behaviour
very tired
the state of being known and talked about by many people
the process of chemical change caused by the action of yeast or bacteria, often changing sugar to alcohol
the action of forming something; the process of being formed
the feeling of being frustrated ; something that causes you to feel frustrated
the quality of being good
the act of annoying or worrying somebody by putting pressure on them or saying or doing unpleasant things to them
the quality of being honest
the state of not having enough food to eat, especially when this causes illness or death ; the feeling caused by a need to eat
the act of making something that has been officially decided start to happen or be used
the act of putting somebody in a prison or another place from which they cannot escape; the state of being there
the fact of not being able to do something
the act of putting something inside something else; a thing that is put inside something else
the act of communicating with somebody, especially while you work, play or spend time with them
the act of getting involved in and trying to influence a situation that should not really involve you, in a way that annoys other people
the act of an army entering another country by force in order to take control of it
a person who examines a situation such as an accident or a crime to find out the truth
showing that you really mean the opposite of what you are saying; expressing irony ; strange or funny because it is very different from what you expect

the funny or strange aspect of a situation that is very different from what you expect; a situation like this ; the use of words that say the opposite of what you really mean, often as a joke and with a tone of voice that shows this
having been the particular thing mentioned for a long time
containing or used in magic; like magic ; wonderful; extremely pleasant
not very good; of only average standard
the state of being a member of a group, a club, an organization, etc.
the act of joining two or more organizations or businesses into one
the quality of being good and deserving praise, or a feature of something that deserves praise
very small in size or amount; as small as possible
the process of getting coal and other minerals from under the ground; the industry involved in this
neither too much nor too little, or not extreme in any way
the ability to keep increasing or developing, or a force that is gained by movement
not interesting or exciting

if you nod, nod your head or your head nods, you move your head up and down to show agreement, understanding, etc. ; to move your head down and up once to say hello or goodbye to somebody or to give them a sign to do something ; to move your head in the direction of somebody/something to show that you are talking about them/it
the act of suggesting or choosing somebody as a candidate in an election, or for a job or an award; the fact of being suggested for this
a person who has been formally suggested for a job, a prize, etc.
without the aim of making a profit
deserving to be noticed or to receive attention; important
very good for you; containing many of the substances which help the body to grow
the process of arranging for somebody outside a company to do work or provide goods for that company
the fact of owning something
the act of taking part in an activity or event
the ability to stay calm and persist without complaining, whether waiting or doing something difficult
an idea, a belief or an image you have as a result of how you see or understand something
the act of allowing somebody to do something, especially when this is done by somebody in a position of authority
a person who studies or writes about philosophy
the quality of being exact, accurate and careful
the state of being pregnant
the fact of being present in a particular place or thing
the act of keeping something in its original state or in good condition
the fact of existing or being very common at a particular time or in a particular place
the act of stopping something bad from happening
the act of selling a business or an industry so that it is no longer owned by the government
producing or achieving a lot, especially in terms of goods, crops, or work done
the process of writing and testing computer programs
the state of being successful, especially in making money
the act of printing and making something available to the public, or the thing that is published
the act of looking for or trying to get something
to build or make something complete and strong again, whether physically or figuratively
the act of remembering who somebody is when you see them, or of identifying what something is
the process of becoming well again after an illness or injury
the act of sharing something out among people in a different way
the act of making an official record of something/somebody
the process of helping somebody to return to a normal, healthy life after they have been in prison or very ill
the feeling of being unwilling to do something and hesitating before you do it, because you do not want to do it or because you are not sure that it is the right thing to do
the act of taking something away or getting rid of it
according to what some people say
to do something harmful to somebody because they have harmed you first
the act of leaving your job and stopping work, usually at a particular age, or the period of your life after that
involving the possibility of something bad happening
the act of doing deliberate damage to equipment, transport, machines, etc. to prevent an enemy from using them, or to protest about something
the act of doing deliberate damage to equipment, transport, machines, etc. to prevent an enemy from using them, or to protest about something
the state of having a healthy, sound, or sensible mind
the act of showing a film or television programme
the fact of protecting yourself in a dangerous or difficult situation
to raise your shoulders and then drop them to show that you do not know or care about something
to stand, sit or move in a lazy way, often with your shoulders and head bent forward
the state of being alone, especially when you find this pleasant
designed or developed for a particular purpose or area of knowledge
the act of forming opinions about what has happened or what might happen without knowing all the facts

the process of keeping something in a particular place until it is needed; the space where things can be kept ; the process of keeping information, etc. on a computer; the way it is kept ; the process of paying to keep furniture, etc. in a special building until you want it
connected with the way in which something is built or organized
extremely attractive or impressive
not very obvious or easy to notice ; behaving or organized in a clever way, and using indirect methods, in order to achieve something
following immediately one after the other
extremely good
the act of carefully watching a person suspected of a crime or a place where a crime may be committed
the state of continuing to live or exist, often despite difficulty or danger
containing symbols, or being used as a symbol
connected with the particular method you use to achieve something
used to refer to an area of land when you are mentioning its natural features, for example, if it is rough, flat, etc.
to make somebody feel extremely frightened
connected with the theatre
connected with the ideas and principles on which a particular subject is based, rather than with practice and experiment ; that could possibly exist, happen or be true, although this is unlikely

a specialist who treats a particular type of illness or problem, or who uses a particular type of treatment ; a person who is trained to treat somebody who has problems with their mental health by talking with them
the fact of being poisonous; the extent to which something is poisonous
the fact of being poisonous; the extent to which something is poisonous
the quality of something, such as a situation or an argument, that makes it easy to understand
having the usual qualities or features of a particular type of person, thing or group ; happening in the usual way; showing what something is usually like
the state of being uncertain
the fact of not being right or fair according to a set of rules or principles; the fact of not treating people equally
the state of being in agreement and working together; the state of being joined together to form one unit
the state of being legally or officially acceptable ; the state of being logical and true
the action of choosing somebody/something in an election or at a meeting
the fact of being weak and easily hurt physically or emotionally
the process of making something, or of becoming, warm or warmer
the quality of being happy and ready to do something
the ability to make sensible decisions and give good advice because of the experience and knowledge that you have ; how sensible something is
